channel.title: Capacity Planning on Chen Kai Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Capacity Planning on Chen Kai Blog

item.title: System Design (1): Thinking in Systems — Load, Latency, and the Art of Estimation
item.description: A friend once asked me to help debug a performance problem. Their photo-sharing app worked fine in development but collapsed under production traffic. The database was melting, the API gateway was timing out, and users were seeing 504 errors. When I asked how many requests per second the system was handling, the answer was “I don’t know.” When I asked what the expected load was, the answer was “I didn’t think about that.”
